title: Pixel Perfection x FARMER'S DELIGHT
description: Compatibility pack that brings Farmer's Delight to Pixel Perfection.
body:
![dig in](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4a79223c62954be09bc499010091015cc3b156e_0.webp) **_Pixel Perfection x FARMER'S DELIGHT_** is, well, **Farmer's Delight**, but designed for [**Pixel Perfection**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) Texture Pack, by [XSSheep](https://www.minecraftforum.net/members/XSSheep?__cf_chl_jschl_tk__=0cd05e71855cf2e8f211c9be122b2d9798fb86ca-1594543114-0-AXuCk8wmp99Q2MLjHOpHpVxrxoPjK70-Nt948w1ABLQPhkDmAKDyldwSZU9wCbrjgULVlrXWpSufWdiIIykCD__10vLmD_-tfkNffpsZBLqAsrp_6-wFOm3KLRyZ-ecDVmcUpWtbt_VZfqtoO_T0soWb-8WLLYQFbdKE72LiDstvcnvhmJzpcJNVMF9aYhLmAhLJ52epgEza9J9KZ64uY--ykq8Jr5NQZ2hu_Jj1He7KHoDsHQuPBoNNEI3fVeF8XCO3rxYpfoKvOGMznGDB0r6iNOgUFhTuLAOehjIYYTNH), and continued by [NovaWostra](https://modrinth.com/user/NovaWostra), who I based this pack mainly on. Try my new Texture pack **Pixel Perfection Fidelity**

This is a **compatibility** pack that changes Farmer's Delight's textures to give them a custom style to play alongside [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) or [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity). Although it is recommended to use it with the main pack, it can also be used as a standalone pack that makes Farmer's Delight's textures look somewhat medieval, less saturated and more detailed. Here you can find [Farmer's Delight for fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) and [Farmer's Delight for forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight). This resource pack also supports [Corn Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/corn-delight-fabric) and [Rustic Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight) (BETA). # DEPENDENCIES - [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) (REQUIRED) or [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity) (REQUIRED) - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) (REQUIRED) # **MY OTHER PACKS** - [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity) - [Pixel Perfection x THE TWILIGHT FOREST](https://modrinth.com/project/pixel-perfection-x-the-twilight-forest) - [Pixel Perfection x AD ASTRA](https://modrinth.com/project/pixel-perfection-x-ad-astra) - [Pixel Perfection x DEHYDRATION](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-dehydration) - [Pixel Perfection x CONTROLIFY](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-controlify) - [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui) - [PPL Compat Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-compatibility-pack) - [PPL Hodgepodge](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-hodgepodge) - [PPL Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-better-grass) - [PPL Custom Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-custom-theme-for-jade)
